Uses of Class
javax.media.mscontrol.MediaConfigException

Packages that use MediaConfigException
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
 

Uses of MediaConfigException in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that throw MediaConfigException
 MediaConfig MediaConfig.createCustomizedClone(Parameters params)
          Create a new MediaConfig, altering the given parameters with the given values.
 VideoLayout MsControlFactory.createVideoLayout(java.lang.String mimeType, java.io.Reader xmlDef)
          Factory method for creating a instance of VideoLayout.
 MediaConfig MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(Configuration<?> configuration)
          Return an instance of predefined MediaConfig, as described by the given Configuration
 MediaConfig MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(java.io.Reader xmlDef)
          Create an instance of MediaConfig, from an xml byte stream (for example a file, or a String),
Example: Reader xmlDoc = new StringReader("<?
 VideoLayout MsControlFactory.getPresetLayout(java.lang.String type)
          Returns a VideoLayout (supported by the mediaserver), with the characteristics as defined by type
 VideoLayout[] MsControlFactory.getPresetLayouts(int numberOfLiveRegions)
          Returns an array of mixer VideoLayouts that are supported by the mediaserver.
